mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cctv_infos ( management_no, open_gov_code, agency_name, road_address, lot_address, purpose, camera_count, pixels, direction, storage_days, install_ym, phone, location, base_date ) VALUES ( #{managementNo}, #{openGovCode}, #{agencyName}, #{roadAddress}, #{lotAddress}, #{purpose}, #{cameraCount}, #{pixels}, #{direction}, #{storageDays}, #{installYm}, #{phone}, ST_GeomFromText(#{locationWkt}, 4326), #{baseDate} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE open_gov_code = VALUES(open_gov_code), agency_name = VALUES(agency_name), purpose = VALUES(purpose), camera_count = VALUES(camera_count), pixels = VALUES(pixels), location = ST_GeomFromText(#{locationWkt}, 4326), base_date = VALUES(base_date)
